_comment: 197M control arm: from-scratch training at 2.2x scale. Establishes baseline for 197M before KD. Teacher ratio at this scale: 1:8.6 (in comfort zone). Same WSD schedule as 90M gate.
_context: 90M KD at 1:19 ratio failed (gap +0.273@3K, accelerating). Scaling to 197M brings ratio to 1:8.6 per Law of Capacity Gap research (§6.4.34).
name: control_197m_15k
